tagline: Plan your day, week, month, and year in one simple digital journal.
description: A clean and beginner-friendly digital planner that helps users organize tasks, goals, habits, notes, and yearly plans.

faqs.question: What is this product?
faqs.answer: This is an Ultimate Digital Planner with daily, weekly, monthly, and yearly planning pages. It helps you organize tasks, goals, habits, notes, and reflections.

faqs.question: What is included in the planner?
faqs.answer: The planner includes daily pages, weekly pages, monthly pages, yearly planning pages, habit tracking, notes, and reflection sections.

faqs.question: What is the price?
faqs.answer: The current sample price is ₹299. You can edit the price in data/product_info.json.

faqs.question: How will I receive the product?
faqs.answer: Since this is a digital product, the customer receives it as an instant download after purchase.

faqs.question: Is this a physical product?
faqs.answer: No, this is a digital product. Nothing will be shipped physically.

faqs.question: Can I print the planner?
faqs.answer: Yes, you can print the planner for personal use if the file format supports printing.

faqs.question: Can I use it on mobile or tablet?
faqs.answer: Yes, you can use the planner on a phone, tablet, laptop, or any device that supports PDF or digital note-taking apps.

faqs.question: Can I get a refund?
faqs.answer: For digital products, refunds usually depend on your store policy. You can edit this answer according to your actual refund rules.

faqs.question: How can I contact support?
faqs.answer: You can contact support at support@example.com. Replace this email with your real support email in data/product_info.json.

faqs.question: How do I buy this product?
faqs.answer: Click the Buy Now button on the website. You can replace the sample purchase link with your real Gumroad, Payhip, Instamojo, Etsy, or store link.
